title: randalia fistulosa
intro: Randalia fistulosa, also known as the Randalia plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Randalia fistulosa has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and reduce pain and swelling. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to provide relief from various health issues.
